attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.TIMECARD_ID, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.TIMECARD_OVN, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.APPROVAL_STATUS, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.RESOURCE_ID, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.START_TIME, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.STOP_TIME, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.RECORDED_HOURS, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.HAS_REASONS, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.SUBMISSION_DATE, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.APPROVAL_ITEM_TYPE, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.APPROVAL_PROCESS_NAME, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.APPROVAL_ITEM_KEY, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE16, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE18, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE19, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE20, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE21, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE22, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE23, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE24, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE25, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE26, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE27, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE28, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE29, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ATTRIBUTE30, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.TK_AUDIT_ITEM_TYPE, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.TK_AUDIT_PROCESS_NAME, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.TK_AUDIT_ITEM_KEY, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.DATA_SET_ID, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ABSENCE_DAYS, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.ABSENCE_HOURS, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY,
(
select TIMECARD_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY
minus
select TIMECARD_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY
) ACM
where 
 ACM.TIMECARD_ID = STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.TIMECARD_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_HXC_TIMECARD_SUMMARY)
